generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SpeedControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller (Vedder) converting desired speed into motor voltage commands for the autonomous vehicle's propulsion system."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo mechanism interfaced through the lower-level chassis for directional control of the Traxxas Slash 4x4 vehicle."
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical braking system capable of executing emergency braking commands triggered remotely via the Digital Twin's User Entity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for 3D environment mapping and object detection with 10m range and 0.25° angular resolution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera providing visual perception and object tracking with RGB-D capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded speed sensor in the lower-level chassis monitoring the autonomous vehicle's instantaneous speed."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor in the upper-level chassis measuring the vehicle's steering wheel position and angular displacement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering model using DBSCAN algorithm (Python implementation) to segment LiDAR data into distinct object clusters."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model (MATLAB/Simulink implementation) for tracking object states and predicting future positions based on clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model implementing ISO 15622 performance class I for basic speed control without road curvature compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state including speed, steering angle, and processed sensor inputs from LiDAR and camera."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks containing position, velocity, and size of detected objects in proximity to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedLiDARData, ProcessedCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ProcessedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Transformed LiDAR point clouds into object tracks via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ProcessedCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth camera data contributing to object detection and tracking through visual perception algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks stored in an external SQL database for long-term analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler, DataStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based enabler executing DBSCAN clustering on raw LiDAR point clouds to generate object clusters for tracking."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation in MATLAB/Simulink for tracking object states and predicting trajectories from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data collection functional entity receiving real-time ego vehicle state and object tracks for digital twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based enabler executing ACC logic (ISO 15622 class I) to compute speed adjustments and emergency braking commands."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data serialization and translation functional entity ensuring alignment of message types and unit conversions between physical and digital twins."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization functional entity rendering real-time vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving paths."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Report generation functional entity creating human-readable timeseries reports from stored database data."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database interface for storing and retrieving timeseries data of ego vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware enabling modular integration of application modules across physical and digital twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for programming the Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer on the physical twin's upper-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transforming raw sensor data (LiDAR point clouds, camera feeds) into interpretable formats (object tracks, vehicle state)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path through the 3D Visualization User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing ACC logic in the cloud to reduce computational burden on the resource-constrained Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling/disabling ACC, modifying desired speed, and triggering emergency braking via the Control Panel User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction, ACCConfigurationAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service creating human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state from external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service storing ego vehicle state and object tracks in an external SQL database for long-term monitoring and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical data on detected objects' position, velocity, and size in proximity to the autonomous vehicle."
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state including speed, steering angle, and projected driving path."
]

instance ACCParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of ACC parameters (desired speed, emergency braking thresholds) based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote triggering of emergency braking commands executed by the physical twin's braking system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ACCConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling/disabling ACC and modifying desired speed through the Control Panel User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports of ACC efficiency, fuel economy, and driving performance derived from stored database data."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Long-term monitoring and analysis of ego vehicle state and object tracks stored in the external SQL database."
]

// C1: Environments/Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosted on the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (lower/upper chassis) executing Data Pre-Processing FE and Actuation FE."
    base:contains DataPreProcessingComponent, ActuationComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on external hardware (cloud/edge) for compute-intensive tasks like ACC controlling and data storage."
    base:contains ACCControlComponent, DataStorageComponent
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity containing centralized UI components (3D Visualization, Control Panel) accessible via networked devices."
    base:contains VisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance DataPreProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component executing point cloud clustering and tracking on the Physical Twin Entity using DBSCAN and Kalman filter models."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component interfacing with physical actuators (speed controller, steering servo, emergency brake) on the Physical Twin Entity."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance ACCControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component executing ACC logic in the Digital Twin Entity to compute speed adjustments and emergency braking commands."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataStorageComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component managing storage and retrieval of timeseries data in the external SQL database within the Digital Twin Entity."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component rendering real-time vehicle state and object tracks in the User Entity."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface component enabling remote management of ACC settings and emergency braking in the User Entity."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the Digital Twin Entity, transmitted back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent from the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Actuation signals** (motor voltage, steering commands) generated by the **Actuation FE** and executed on the PT's **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with:
  - **Real-time synchronization** for ACC control, adhering to a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms** across devices to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
  - **Perception cycle updates** (object tracks, vehicle state) at frequencies dictated by sensor refresh rates (e.g., LiDAR and camera feeds)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Pre-Processing FE** (point cloud processing) and **Actuation FE** (motor/steering commands).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes **ACC Controlling FE**, **Data Collection FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Data Storage** (external SQL).
    3. **User Entity**: Provides **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE** for human-machine interaction.
  - **Deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on PT's **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (edge computing).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on external hardware (cloud/edge) for compute-intensive tasks.
    - **User Entity**: Accessible via networked devices (e.g., laptops) for remote monitoring/management.
  - **Data Flow**: Sensor data propagates from PT → **Data Pre-Processing FE** → **Data Collection FE** → **Digital Twin Entity** → **User Entity** for visualization/reporting."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., CREO Simulate for predictive maintenance).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time optimization** (fuel economy, driving performance) and **health monitoring** of the PT (e.g., brake system prognosis).
  - **Product Lifecycle Management**: Supports **digital threads** for continuous end-to-end information flow, integrating data from design to operation.
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization and remote management capabilities."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** for event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC performance class I.
    - **DBSCAN + Kalman filter** for accurate object tracking.
    - **3D Visualization FE** for transparent HMI, aligning with **ADAS trust principles**.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Limited by hardware constraints (e.g., **Jetson Orin Nano** compute limits), mitigated via cloud offloading for ACC logic.
  - **Verification**: Publicly available **source code** and **demonstration** for reproducibility and third-party validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Intra-Entity Communication**: **ROS2 topics** for message passing between SW components (e.g., LiDAR → Point Cloud Clustering → Data Collection).
  - **Inter-Entity Communication**: **Wi-Fi network** (UDP/TCP) for data exchange between **Physical Twin Entity**, **Digital Twin Entity**, and **User Entity**.
  - **Data Translation**: **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions (e.g., motor voltage commands, sensor units).
  - **Network Protocols**: **ROS2** (intra-entity), **Wi-Fi** (inter-entity), with potential integration of **OPC UA** for standardized communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the PT's **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (edge device) for low-latency sensor processing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware** (cloud/edge) to handle compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic, data storage).
  - **User Entity**: Accessible via **networked devices** (e.g., laptops) for remote monitoring/management.
  - **Data Storage**: External **SQL database** for long-term storage of timeseries data, decoupled from the PT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration includes:
  - **External Information Systems**: Potential integration with **vehicle manufacturer databases** for fleet-wide analytics.
  - **Standardized Interfaces**: Compliance with **ISO 23247 RA** and **ISO 15622** for interoperability with other DTs or automotive systems.
  - **Data Exchange**: **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** enable communication with external tools (e.g., **MATLAB/Simulink** for simulation, **SQL databases** for analytics)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247 (Part 2)**: Reference architecture for DT development, adapted for automotive use with customizations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for ACC performance class I, guiding the implementation of basic speed control logic.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Specifies **100 ms end-to-end latency** for V2V communication, ensuring real-time synchronization.
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular software integration in robotics and autonomous systems."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Latency Constraints**: **100 ms maximum latency** to prevent real-time control failures (e.g., collision avoidance).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **100 ms accuracy** for distributed event ordering and data integrity.
  - **Remote Operation Safety**: Emergency braking commands are directly executable on the PT, with **hardware-level actuation** (motor/steering servos) to ensure physical safety.
  - **Data Integrity**: **Data Translation FE** validates and converts data to prevent malformed commands or sensor errors.
  - **Hardware Redundancy**: Critical functions (e.g., emergency braking) are prioritized on the PT's **Jetson Orin Nano** to mitigate cloud/edge failures.
  - **Safety-Critical Validation**: Compliance with **ISO 15622** for ACC ensures adherence to automotive safety standards."
]
